project.name: Titan AI
project.description: Autonomous software engineering operating system, implemented as Titan Core: seven cooperating engines (Planner, Orchestrator, Context, Knowledge, Execution, Validation, Learning). See architecture.md Section 6 and decisions.md ADR-0002.

next_phase.name: Technical Discovery & Stack Selection
next_phase.blocked_reason: Awaiting stack evaluation against the approved Titan Core architecture (architecture.md Section 6).

tech_stack.notes: See tech_stack.md for the decision framework, now including engine-fit criteria (Section 3a). No stack has been locked in yet — no code exists. Phase 002 is next.

architecture.notes: architecture.md Section 6 now defines the approved Titan Core engine architecture (7 engines). See ADR-0002 in decisions.md. Concrete stack-level implementation begins once Phase 002 selects a stack and Phase 004 sets up the environment.

titan_core.notes: Implementation order follows architecture.md Section 6.1's data-flow dependencies: Context and Knowledge first, then Planner, Orchestrator, Execution, Validation, and Learning last.

human_action_required: Confirm or adjust the Titan Core engine boundaries in architecture.md Section 6 before Phase 002 (stack selection) proceeds.
Provide any constraints (hosting, budget, language preference) relevant to Phase 002 stack selection.
